title: Hellish Trials
description: Generates unique trial chambers in the Nether dimension!
body:
![](https://i.postimg.cc/HxQBWpY1/hellish_trials_banner.png)

**Hellish Trials** generates unique trial dungeons in the Nether dimension. These dungeons include features from the Tricky Trials Update, including vaults, trial spawners, the Breeze, and tons of wind charges!

**Compatible with all mods that add nether biomes and structures**

**REQUIERES ARCHITECTURY API**
